questions.question: Consider a binary classification problem where one class has 1000 samples and the other class has 10 samples. What strategy can be employed to handle this class imbalance and discuss its implications on the model's performance?
questions.hint: Consider the impact on model performance and potential consequences

questions.question: A dataset has 90% of one class and 10% of another class. What is the most suitable method to balance the data, and explain the underlying rationale behind this choice?
questions.hint: Understand the concept of oversampling and undersampling

questions.question: Suppose you are working on a classification problem where one class has a large number of features compared to the other class. What strategy would you use to handle this class imbalance, and explain the reasoning behind your choice?
questions.hint: Consider the impact of feature dominance on model performance
